full_text:
Peng He
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng He. Messenger of Zhuge Zhan, he fought his way through Wei lines to get to Wu. Peng He may not have existed in history. Peng He was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
